meta.title: DEF CON 33 BiC Village - Sydney Johns RE for the Rest of Us An Introduction to Reverse Engineering
meta.description: - Break into RE with hands-on demos using Arduino and Ghidra. You'll explore low-level behavior, binary analysis, and board-level understanding in a beginner-friendly way.
